description: Letter from [...] Sulaymān Kohen to [...] b. Mūsā. In Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions Abū l-Raḍiyy; the purchase of an ʿarḍī cloth from Fustat; 'the prices of the country'; [...] b. Elishaʿ; Makhlūf. The sender is likely Abū l-Rabīʿ Sulaymān the son of Abū Zikrī Kohen; cf. Sassoon 713 (PGPID 9640) and T-S NS 224.200 (PGPID 24007).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
